description: Queen Patch 16 (15 July 2020) — Improvements, Changes, Combat Balance Changes.

sections.heading: Improvements

items.text: [Android] Improved memory handling to increase stability for devices with over 4GB memory

sections.searchable_text: Improvements [Android] Improved memory handling to increase stability for devices with over 4GB memory

sections.heading: Changes

items.text: Damage taken from Hellgate Warden and Gatekeeper spells can no longer be reflected

sections.searchable_text: Changes Damage taken from Hellgate Warden and Gatekeeper spells can no longer be reflected

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Holy Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Holy Staffs Flash Heal (all Holy Staffs) Base Heal: 45 → 40 AoE Heal: 50 → 30

subsections.heading: Quarterstaffs

subitems.text: Hit Interval: every 0.5s → every 0.75s (this means the debuff stacks more slowly on enemies)

subsections.searchable_text: Quarterstaffs Fatal Blade (Black Monk Staff) Hit Interval: every 0.5s → every 0.75s (this means the debuff stacks more slowly on enemies)

subsections.heading: Armors

subitems.text: Burn Aura can no longer be stacked, meaning a maximum of 1 aura applies to any given target
Self Damage per tick: 3% of max health → 2% of max health

subsections.searchable_text: Armors Self Ignition (Specter Jacket) Burn Aura can no longer be stacked, meaning a maximum of 1 aura applies to any given target Self Damage per tick: 3% of max health → 2% of max health

sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Holy Staffs Flash Heal (all Holy Staffs) Quarterstaffs Fatal Blade (Black Monk Staff) Armors Self Ignition (Specter Jacket)
